system.notes:
Proposed USAF warship, a cross between a Deep Space Explorer and a Clipper, relying on fast-deploying mini-shuttles or deltas. None exist.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.38): Carrier · 1400 · 6 · 6 · Chemical, Nuclear · 6, 12 · Nuclear, Fuel Cell, Solar · 80% · 3 · 125m3 · 4 · 7 · 3 · 15 · 4 · 6 deltas or 5 mini-shuttles, 1 cargo/passenger OTV

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 1400 million eb; Crew 6; Passengers 6; Drive Type Chemical, Nuclear; Burn Elements 6, 12; Power Type Nuclear, Fuel Cell, Solar; Sensors 80%; Computers 3; Cargo 125m3; Actions 4; Weapon Spaces 7; Armor (max SP) 3; Damage Points 15; Overkill Points 4; Shuttlecraft 6 deltas or 5 mini-shuttles, 1 cargo/passenger OTV.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
